market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Quiet Private Annex Near Town, £115 Night
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your self‑contained annex – an entire home that offers a peaceful retreat for up to four guests. This private two‑bedroom space is perfect for families, friends, or couples who need a little extra room while staying in the heart of the city. At just £115 per night, you’re enjoying a rate that’s 34 % lower than the city’s median nightly price of £175, yet the annex already boasts an impressive 4.98 rating from 66 satisfied reviewers. 

The layout includes a comfortable living area, a fully equipped kitchen, and two well‑appointed bedrooms with fresh linens. High‑speed Wi‑Fi keeps you connected, and the modern bathroom provides all the essentials for a refreshing stay. With a current 47.8 % occupancy over the next 90 days, you have 47 open nights that can easily be filled by travelers seeking great value. 

While the annex currently does not list specific amenities, guests appreciate the quiet ambience, private entrance, and the flexibility of an entire home setting. Whether you’re in town for work, sightseeing, or a weekend getaway, this annex delivers comfort, convenience, and exceptional value at a price that stands out in the market. Book now and experience a cost‑effective stay without compromising on space or location.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor space (garden or patio) to enhance the private feel
Dedicated parking spot for guests with cars
Entertainment options such as a smart TV or board games
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, high‑resolution exterior shot of the annex as the cover photo to highlight its private, stand‑alone nature and attract clicks.
key_diagnosis: Raise the nightly rate closer to the market median (£175) – you’re 34 % below while already achieving 47.8 % occupancy, so a modest increase could boost revenue without hurting bookings.
Add high‑value amenities (outdoor seating, parking, entertainment) to justify a higher price point and attract guests willing to pay more.
Invest in professional photos covering every room and set the exterior as the lead image; better visuals typically raise click‑through rates by 20‑30 %.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your annex is already booked 48 % of the next 90 days at £115/night – a 34 % discount to the city average – you could safely raise the rate and capture up to £2,300 extra in the same period.
